page.label: Settings / Diagnostics
page.title: Settings
page.description: Local application settings, tool diagnostics and runtime information.

descriptions.autoReconnect: VR Control Center reconnects to known device addresses on startup and after connection loss.
descriptions.launchAtStartup: Starts VR Control Center when the user signs in to Windows or macOS.
descriptions.launchAtStartupUnavailable: Startup integration is prepared but not implemented yet.
descriptions.closeBehavior: Controls what happens when the main window is closed.
descriptions.trayUnavailable: Tray mode is not implemented yet.
descriptions.runtimePollingInterval: Controls how often connected devices refresh battery and foreground app data.
descriptions.customPath: Choose a local executable through a secure system dialog.
descriptions.bundledUnavailable: Bundled binaries are not included in this build.
descriptions.verboseLogging: Adds more diagnostic details for ADB, scrcpy and runtime polling.

logging.clearConfirm: Clear old log files? The active log file will be kept.

danger.resetDescription: Deletes user devices, stream profiles and settings, then creates a new default config.
danger.resetConfirm: Reset configuration? Devices, profiles and settings will be removed.
